title: Interleaving String
output_format: Return `true` if `s3` is formed by an interleaving of `s1` and `s2`.
constraints:
- `0 <= s1.length, s2.length <= 100`
- `0 <= s3.length <= 200`
- `s1`, `s2`, and `s3` consist of lowercase English letters.
function_signature: function isInterleave(s1: string, s2: string, s3: string): boolean {}
